A Love Written in the Stars

Our Story

❧

Spring 2023

Their paths crossed for the first time — a simple moment that felt like destiny.

January 2024

The proposal — the most beautiful "yes" that changed everything.

July 2, 2026

The wedding day — the beginning of forever, surrounded by everyone they love.

" God wrote this day for us long before we ever met — we ask Him to bless our union in this life and the next. "

Aya & Abdelrahman
